core_mission.stated: Revolutionize cloud infrastructure security through runtime-powered CNAPP (Cloud-Native Application Protection Platform)
core_mission.observed: Combine cloud security posture management with real-time runtime context and protection to enable accurate prioritization and fast response

module_a_company_dna.problem_space: Organizations struggle with cloud infrastructure visibility and security posture management. Traditional approaches lack real-time context, forcing security teams to waste time on low-priority alerts while missing critical risks in hybrid cloud environments.
